name: Re (Tokenized Reinsurance Syndicate)

custodian.name: On-chain capital pool custody + traditional reinsurance trust structures

summary: Decentralized reinsurance platform structured as a Bermuda-licensed reinsurer with on-chain capital pools. Backed by Tribe Capital, Nascent, and traditional reinsurance industry participants. Underwrites property/casualty risk through Bermuda Class 3A framework with capital from accredited investors via tokenized syndicate participation. Differs from Nayms (primary insurance marketplace) by focusing on reinsurance specifically and operating under more established Bermuda regulatory framework.

sources.title: TechCrunch: Re reinsurance Bermuda licensing coverage

underlying_asset: Reinsurance risk: property catastrophe, specialty reinsurance lines.
reserve_composition: Capital provided by accredited investors via tokenized syndicate; backed by Bermuda Class 3A regulatory requirements.
secondary_market: Limited — syndicate participation locked for treaty period.
oracle_provider: Claims adjudicated through traditional reinsurance process.
redemption_mechanism: Capital locked for treaty period; distributions on treaty closure less claims.
upgrade_authority: Re Insurance Holdings board under BMA supervision.

timeline.event: Re launches with Bermuda Class 3A reinsurance license
First reinsurance treaties bound and capitalized via on-chain syndicates
